deep_dive.title: AutoSIFT: Automatic Style Sifting for Controllable Speech Generation with Arbitrary Style Infilling
deep_dive.abstract: State-of-the-art text-to-speech (TTS) models achieve impressive naturalness and expressiveness, yet fine-grained, disentangled control over speaking styles remains challenging. In professional scenarios such as film dubbing, game voice acting, and video content generation, users often need to modify a specific style category, such as emotion, age, or gender, while preserving all others. Existing style-controllable TTS methods typically rely on either text-described styles or speech-reference style transfer, making it difficult to jointly control explicit semantic attributes and preserve subtle, text-undescribed prosodic details. We propose AutoSIFT, a controllable speech generation framework for category-level style editing. AutoSIFT decomposes speaking style into known text-describable categories and unknown residual styles that capture non-verbal prosody and speaker-specific nuances. It consists of a generalized Style Disentangler, which extracts category-aware style prototypes from reference speech, and an Arbitrary Style Infiller, which selectively infills unspecified style categories from the reference. By replacing only text-specified style categories while preserving residual speech-derived styles, AutoSIFT enables natural, expressive, and highly customizable speech generation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: personalized multimodal generation via controllable speech style editing
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过可控语音风格编辑实现个性化多模态生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过可控语音风格编辑实现个性化多模态生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过可控语音风格编辑实现个性化多模态生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: AutoSIFT enables controllable speech generation with fine-grained style editing (emotion, age, gender) while preserving non-target prosody, addressing the need for personalized multimodal content creation in professional scenarios like dubbing and game voice acting.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有可控语音生成方法难以独立修改特定风格类别（如情感、年龄、性别）同时保留其他韵律细节。本文提出AutoSIFT框架，实现类别级风格编辑，允许用户精准控制单一语义属性而保持其余风格不变。实验证明该方法在电影配音、游戏配音等场景中达到精细个性化控制，为多模态个性化生成提供高效工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有可控语音生成方法难以独立修改特定风格类别（如情感、年龄、性别）同时保留其他韵律细节。本文提出AutoSIFT框架，实现类别级风格编辑，允许用户精准控制单一语义属性而保持其余风格不变。实验证明该方法在电影配音、游戏配音等场景中达到精细个性化控制，为多模态个性化生成提供高效工具。
